verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a member of the IZUMO family of immunoglobulin-superfamily proteins. The founding member IZUMO1 is a well-characterized sperm surface protein essential for sperm-egg fusion. IZUMO4 (also known as IZUMO family member 4) shares structural features with the family and has been reported in testis/sperm tissue, suggesting germline/reproductive-lineage-restricted surface expression. Given its Ig-like domain architecture and family membership, surface display on sperm cells is plausible, but expression appears restricted to a narrow germline/reproductive lineage, making this contextual/tissue_restricted_surface rather than broadly surface-accessible.
